title: BetterParry
description: Allows you to blockhit on modern versions on minecraft!
body:
# BetterParry

## A mod that allows you to blockhit in modern minecraft!
Allows you to make the sword blocking animation from minecraft 1.7 come back! This is a client side mod (the blocking only appears client side) It doesn't do anything that will get you banned from a server.

## A continuation of the mod "parry"
